feature_descriptions.cip_service: encoded CIP service (read tag / write tag / forward-open / reset)
feature_descriptions.command_rate: ENIP / CIP requests per source over the window (baseline vs. flood)
feature_descriptions.list_identity_rate: ListIdentity requests per source over the window (device discovery)
feature_descriptions.new_source: boolean: first time this source talks to this device
feature_descriptions.target_path: frequency-encoded CIP class / instance path (unexpected object target)
feature_descriptions.write_flag: boolean: a CIP write / set service (tag write, attribute set)

schema_description: (batch) Suricata EtherNet/IP + CIP ICS set: commands/services, tag-write tampering, discovery rate
